name: NEFENTUS — Crypto Invoicing
desc: Landing and product UX for seamless crypto invoicing: wallet selection (e.g. MetaMask), multi-currency checkout, VAT, and gas-aware totals—positioned for businesses moving to digital assets.

name: Betpanda — Web3 Gaming Platform
desc: Dark-mode, high-conversion UI with multi-asset support (30+ cryptocurrencies), deposit flows, live countdowns, and trust integrations—representative of complex real-time frontend and Web3 payment surfaces.

name: Talkie.ai — Healthcare AI Agents
desc: SaaS marketing site for voice/SMS front-desk AI: patient scheduling dialogue, HIPAA and SOC positioning, and impact metrics—aligned with production AI systems and regulated-industry requirements.

name: Betpanda — Campaigns & Live Ops
desc: Hero, sponsorship, and engagement modules with carousel onboarding, social proof, weekly raffle timers, and leaderboard-style tables—showing component depth and stateful promotional experiences at scale.

name: Prism — Web3 Card Experience
desc: DeFi-style landing: gradient hero, trust stats, and product visualization for crypto-linked spending—modern Next/React-quality layout, typography, and CTA patterns typical of fintech and blockchain brands.

name: Developer Portfolio
desc: This site—static-first portfolio showcasing blockchain, AI, and full-stack work with fast navigation and EmailJS-ready contact.
